mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT r.name FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.del = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.sort
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, create_time) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{roleId}, NOW())
